name: Marking the Wrong Symptoms: Evaluating LLM Watermarks in Medical Texts
summary: arXiv:2607.20462v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into clinical workflows, stressing the need for reliable traceability of model-generated out...
description: arXiv:2607.20462v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into clinical workflows, stressing the need for reliable traceability of model-generated output with watermarking. Yet, most watermarks are evaluated on general-purpose benchmarks, leaving domains like medicine, where small token-level perturbations can result in significant semantic changes...
author: Melanie Rieff, Robin Staab, Thibaud Gloaguen, Stefan Hegselmann, Martin Vechev
